attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SMXSS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, 
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PTY_KEY,
COALESCE((SOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT*100),0)      END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I'			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL_XAAS SOMN
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OTM_MANUAL_TRX_XAAS  OMTX
ON SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=OMTX.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=OMTX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT  SMXSS
ON OMTX.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT/*IS THE JOIN FOR DERIVING SO_SUBSCRIPTION_ITEM_SALES_TRANSACTION_KEY*/
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP 
ON SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPSV
ON SOMN.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT 
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
AND NPSV.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
WHERE SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
SOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,SOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,SOMN.SAV_ID
,SOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,SOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,SOMN.START_DATE
,SOMN.STATUS_CODE
,SOMN.CREATION_DATE
,SOMN.USER_NAME
,SOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,SOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOMN.BATCH_ID,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL_XAAS SOMN
WHERE  SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' 
AND (NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP
WHERE SOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01')
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV  NPSV
WHERE SOMN.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT 
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
AND NPSV.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'))
AND EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_MANUAL_TRX_XAAS  OMTX,
$$ETLVWDB.SM_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITMSLSTRX_NRT SMXSS
WHERE   SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=OMTX.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND SOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE=OMTX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
AND  OMTX.SOURCE_TRX_ID=SMXSS.SK_TRX_ID_INT)

SELECT
EOMN.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID
,EOMN.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,EOMN.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,EOMN.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,EOMN.SAV_ID
,EOMN.SPLIT_PERCENT
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,EOMN.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,EOMN.START_DATE
,EOMN.STATUS_CODE
,EOMN.CREATION_DATE
,EOMN.USER_NAME
,EOMN.VALIDATION_DATE
,EOMN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,EOMN.BATCH_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIE_EXT_MNL_XAAS EOMN
WHERE EOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' AND NOT EXISTS
(  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_MNL_XAAS SOMN
WHERE SOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID=EOMN.ORDER_LINE_ID 
AND SOMN.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT')
